prompt: A widening spiral diagram of Ernst Junger's Part 2 argument. Seven concentric rings, each representing a new domain for the measurable-versus-fateful-time distinction: astrology, planning, science, tragedy, happiness, periodicity, and So-Sein. Clean philosophical visualization, restrained palette, exact geometry, no clutter, no decorative flourishes, no people, no title, no legend, no labels unless Gemini cannot avoid them. One coherent diagram.
